title: ISPCC - 2012
content: 2012 IEEE International Conference on Signal Processing, Computing and Control (2012 IEEE ISPCC) March 15-17, 2012 Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat IEEE Conference Record Number#:20622 The Deadline For Paper Submission Is Over. We Are Not Accepting Any More Papers Now. Papers will be indexed in IEEEXplore IEEE Conference Listing Proceeding of the conference The International Conference on Signal Processing, computing and control will take place at the Jaypee University of Information Technology, Shimla, India. The 2012 IEEE ISPCC is co-sponsored by IEEE Delhi section. The ISPCC meeting will focus on signal processing, Computing, Control and their applications. The conference will feature world-class speakers, tutorials, exhibits, and poster sessions on the following topics or their applications: Signal Processing VLSI And Embedded computing Networks and Communication Control and Automation Artificial Intelligence and Neural Netowrks Nano technology and quantum computing for more details, click here Welcome to Shimla Shimla, the summer capital of India during British period, is a beautiful city rich in history and architecture. It has become the business, cultural, political and scientific heart of the Himachal Pradesh. Submission of Manuscripts Prospective authors are invited to submit full-length, 5-6-page manuscripts, including figures and references through the web site. The official conference web site will provide further details later. Please note that all submission deadlines are strict. Important deadlines Special Session & Tutorial Proposals Due Dec 10, 2011 Notification of Special Session & Tutorial Acceptance Dec 15, 2011 Submission of Manuscript Dec 30, 2011 Notification of manuscript Acceptance By Jan 28, 2012 Revised manuscript Upload Deadline Feb 05, 2012 Registration Deadline for Authors Feb 10, 2012
